detaileddescription.para: Public destructor for the scene object. See implementation for cleanup details.

briefdescription.para: Instantiate a new game object in the scene.

parameterdescription.para: Initial position for the instantiated object.

simplesect.para: A handle to the created GameObject.

briefdescription.para: Instantiate a new game object in the scene with a specific UUID.

parameterdescription.para: UUID to assign to the new object.
Initial position for the instantiated object.

simplesect.para: A handle to the created GameObject.

briefdescription.para: Transition the scene into the "awake" state.

detaileddescription.para: See implementation for the exact semantics performed during Awake.

briefdescription.para: Transition the scene into the "sleep" state.

detaileddescription.para: See implementation for the exact semantics performed during Sleep.

briefdescription.para: Run per-frame update for the scene.

detaileddescription.para: See implementation for which subsystems are updated.

briefdescription.para: Run fixed-timestep updates for the scene (e.g. physics).

detaileddescription.para: See implementation for timestep and systems affected.

briefdescription.para: Perform a 2D raycast against the scene's physics world.

parameterdescription.para: Output parameter populated with hit information if a hit occurs.

simplesect.para: true if the ray hit something and result was populated, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve a game object by UUID.

parameterdescription.para: UUID of the requested game object.

simplesect.para: Handle to the corresponding GameObject. See implementation for behavior when not found.

briefdescription.para: Invoke a function for each game object in the scene.

parameterdescription.para: Function to call for each GameObject.

detaileddescription.para: See implementation for exact destruction timing and side-effects.

briefdescription.para: Access the underlying entt registry for this scene.
Get the unique id of this scene.
Get delegate invoked when a GameObject is spawned.
Get delegate invoked when a GameObject is destroyed.
Get delegate invoked when a component is added to a GameObject.
Get delegate invoked when a component is removed from a GameObject.
Access the ECS lifecycle system for this scene.

simplesect.para: Reference to the ECSLifecycleSystem instance used by the scene.

briefdescription.para: Query whether the scene's runtime is active.

simplesect.para: true when the scene is marked as running, false otherwise.
